base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hammer_projectile_spin — a projectile from 1985 super mario bros. spins counterclockwise as it travels. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 4-frame hammer rotation — spins counterclockwise as it travels; follows arcing trajectory
